name: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co.
h1: Arthur J. Gallagher &'s GCC footprint in India
lede: Arthur J. Gallagher & runs five capability centers across five Indian cities. Bengaluru, Kolhapur, Mumbai, Pune and Shimoga, covering CoE, built over twenty years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arthur J. Gallagher & office in India. We map five, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arthur J. Gallagher & GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arthur J. Gallagher & runs 5 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Kolhapur, Mumbai, Pune, Shimoga), covering CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Arthur J. Gallagher &'s India footprint covers Bengaluru, Kolhapur, Mumbai, Pune and Shimoga, spanning CoE. The centers deliver Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 23 decision-makers, in one profile.
